problem: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: How are long-term memories physically encoded in neural tissue? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Default. Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 31 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
